goal: Implement supervised live preview UI for the two proven structured families.

familiesWithControls.hl.animation: Global animation speed spin (0.1..=20) with Preview with recovery, countdown, Keep, Revert now, Cancel; modify-existing enforced against the global record
familiesWithControls.hl.curve: Default curve Y0 spin (-1..=2) with the same supervised flow against the default bezier

scope: modify-existing records only: the controller refuses missing records before any command, no creation or deletion operations exist in the module (guard-tested), readback verification is mandatory on apply and revert
saveDisabledReason: persisting structured-family records goes through the active-config pilot path, which requires Safe Live Save Mode plus the remaining pilot gates; preview stays runtime-only
executionPath: UI spin/buttons -> FamilyPreviewController -> fixed-shape validated commands via the eval runner -> readback verification
sessionRecovery: unconfirmed family previews revert on detail re-render and window close (controller registry); Kept previews are session-only and revertible

liveProofs.hl.animation: controller round trip live: 8.00 -> 8.5 -> 8.00 exact (env-gated, run once)
liveProofs.hl.curve: controller round trip live: 0.75 -> 0.76 -> 0.75 exact (env-gated, run once)

nextRecommendedWork: Extend to a record picker for other explicitly-overridden animation leaves and user-defined curves, one proven record shape at a time.
